= Examples

Minimal AsciiDoc slide-decks to showcase reveal.js' features, doubling as regression tests where useful — this is why some metadata (AsciiDoc comments `//`) is present.

They form the `standalone` family of the asciidoc-testkit fixture corpus (see `tasks/testkit.rake`): converted as full reveal.js presentations, as opposed to the generic AsciiDoc-construct corpus (bundled with asciidoc-testkit itself), which is converted embedded.
A file here with no matching `test/expected/standalone/<name>.html` is not (yet) covered by a regression test.

== Preview examples (ruby)

    $ bundle exec rake examples:convert

== Preview examples (javascript)

    $ bundle exec rake build:converter:opal
    $ npm run examples

Make sure you have a link between `test/fixtures/standalone/node_modules/` and `node_modules/` where reveal.js is installed.
